---
applyTo: "src/components/**/*.tsx,src/components/**/*.ts"
description: "Use when creating or editing UI components. Covers shadcn/ui restrictions, theme handling, mobile-first design, Framer Motion rules, and interaction patterns."
---

# Component Conventions

## shadcn/ui — Do Not Edit

- **NEVER** edit files in `src/components/ui/` — these are auto-generated by shadcn CLI
- Create wrapper components in `src/components/[domain]/` instead

## Theme & Colors

- **Never hardcode background colors** — use `bg-[var(--theme-bg)]` CSS variable
- Use `data-theme` attribute for theme-aware styling
- Theme changes invalidate ALL queries — components must handle cache refreshes

## Color Rules for Items/Tasks

- **No red** for individual task/item rows — use theme colors (pink/cyan)
- Container headers CAN use red/amber
- Overdue date labels → `text-white/40`

## Interaction Patterns

- **Single click** = open detail view
- **Double click** = toggle pin/favorite
- Never mix both on the same element

## Framer Motion

- **NEVER** mix `<motion.div draggable>` with HTML5 drag events — use one or the other
- Framer Motion intercepts HTML5 drag, causing silent failures

## Mobile-First

- Always design for mobile viewport first
- Test touch targets (min 44px), scroll behavior, and bottom nav spacing

## Icons

- Use futuristic icons where available (toasts, UI elements)
- Import from lucide-react or the project's icon system

## Contexts

- Use `Safe` variant (`useSyncSafe()`, `useAppModeSafe()`, `useTabSafe()`) in components that may render outside their provider
